title: Isolation of mouse thoracic aorta for Western blot
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"end7d","text":"This protocol describes the preparation of aorta samples from mouse for Western blot analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Sacrifice the mouse by an overdose intraperitoneal injection of sodium pentobarbital.
Fix the mouse on the tray, spray with 70% ethanol.
Open the mouse, dissect the thoracic aorta. Take the lower half portion, rinse in phosphate-buffered saline (PBS).
Remove the adventitia (use microscope to guide), rinse in PBS.
Blot to dry with a paper towel, quickly transfer to liquid N 2 to freeze.
creator: Muthi Ikawati
